shellCommands.command: /bin/bash -lc "pwd && rg --files -g '"'!*node_modules*'"' -g '"'!*.lock'"' | head -80 && printf '\\n--- package ---\\n' && (sed -n '1,220p' package.json 2>/dev/null || true)"
/bin/bash -lc "sed -n '1,240p' app/layout.tsx && printf '\\n--- config ---\\n' && sed -n '1,200p' next.config.ts && printf '\\n--- tsconfig ---\\n' && sed -n '1,200p' tsconfig.json"

/bin/bash -lc 'first=$(curl -fsS http://localhost:3000/ | sed -n '"'s/.*<time dateTime=\"\\(["'^"]*'"\\)\".*/\\1/p')
second="'$(curl -fsS http://localhost:3000/ | sed -n '"'s/.*<time dateTime=\"\\(["'^"]*'"\\)\".*/\\1/p')
printf 'first=%s\\nsecond=%s\\n' \""'$first" "$second"
test -n "$first" && test -n "$second" && test "$first" != "$second"'
